## Preserved prior README notes

<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# csv

This folder contains the nine released consolidation CSVs.

Each row is one model session. The CSVs include session metadata,
extracted response fields, normalized fields where applicable, and
answer-key verdict columns derived by the scoring layer.

## Files

| CSV | Surface | Rows |
|---|---|---:|
| `schema-test-A-tests.csv` | Schema A duplicating boundary test | 108 |
| `schema-test-A-new-system-tests.csv` | Schema A non-duplicating control | 108 |
| `schema-test-B-tests.csv` | Schema B closed-menu method test | 108 |
| `test-01-kernel-tests.csv` | KO7/Fruit kernel test | 324 |
| `test-02-completion-tests-nat-lex.csv` | Nat-lex scaffold completion | 108 |
| `test-03-completion-tests-ordinal.csv` | Ordinal scaffold completion | 108 |
| `test-04-measure-verification-tests.csv` | Measure verification | 108 |
| `test-05-candidate-class-reasoning-tests.csv` | Candidate-class reasoning | 108 |
| `test-06-branch-realism-tests.csv` | Branch-realism strategy audit | 108 |

## How To Verify

- Use `../schemas/` for column definitions.
- Use `../normalization/` for normalization provenance.
- Use `../../7.scoring/` to rerun verdict derivations in `--dry-run`
  mode.
- Use `../../8.analytics/` to regenerate paper-number markdown outputs
  from these CSVs.
